meta.title: 颜色和形状
meta.description: Basic colors and shapes vocabulary in Chinese, with simple descriptive sentences.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 기초 색깔과 모양 어휘, 간단한 묘사 문장.

explanation.en: 「红色」(hóngsè) means "red".

questions.prompt: 「红色」是什么意思？(What does 红色 mean?)

explanation.en: 「蓝色」(lánsè) means "blue".

questions.prompt: 「蓝色」的拼音是什么？(pinyin for 蓝色)

explanation.en: 「圆形」(yuánxíng) means "circle/round shape".

questions.prompt: 「圆形」是什么意思？(What does 圆形 mean?)

explanation.en: 「黑色」means "black" and 「白色」means "white".

questions.prompt: 「黑色」和「白色」是什么意思？

explanation.en: 「三角形」(sānjiǎoxíng) means "triangle".

questions.prompt: 「三角形」是什么意思？(What does 三角形 mean?)

explanation.en: 「红」(hóng) means "red"; 红色 = red color.

questions.prompt: 这个苹果是___色的。(This apple is red.)

explanation.en: 「蓝」(lán) means "blue"; the sky (天空) is typically blue.

questions.prompt: 天空是___色的。(The sky is blue.)

explanation.en: 「绿」(lǜ) means "green"; grass (草) is typically green.

questions.prompt: 草是___色的。(Grass is green.)

explanation.en: 「正方形」means "square"; 正方形的盒子 = a square box.
explanation.ko: 「正方形」는 '정사각형'을 뜻하며 상자가 정사각형 모양임을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 这个盒子是___形的。(This box is square-shaped.)

explanation.en: 「黄」(huáng) means "yellow"; the sun is often described as yellow.

questions.prompt: 太阳是___色的。(The sun is yellow / golden.)

explanation.en: 「颜色」(yánsè) means "color"; 什么颜色 asks what color something is.
explanation.ko: 「颜色」(yánsè)는 '색깔'을 뜻하며 '什么颜色'는 무슨 색인지 묻는 표현이다.

questions.prompt: 这件衣服是什么___？(What color is this piece of clothing?)

explanation.en: 「的」at the end here forms a descriptive adjective phrase: 绿色和红色的 = "green and red [colored]".
explanation.ko: 여기서 문장 끝의 「的」는 서술적 형용사구를 만든다.

questions.prompt: 这个西瓜是绿色和红色___的。(This watermelon is green and red.)

explanation.en: 「蓝」(lán) means "blue", often associated with a calm feeling.

questions.prompt: 我喜欢___色，因为它让我觉得平静。(I like blue because it makes me feel calm.)

explanation.en: 「红」means "red"; stop signs are typically red.

questions.prompt: 停车标志通常是___色的八边形。(A stop sign is usually a red octagon.)

explanation.en: 「形」(xíng) means "shape"; 长方形 = rectangle.

questions.prompt: 这张纸是长方___。(This paper is rectangular.)

explanation.en: 「半圆」(bànyuán) means "semicircle/crescent", used descriptively here.

questions.prompt: 这个饼干是___形的，像月亮一样。(This cookie is crescent-shaped, like the moon.)

explanation.en: 「很」(hěn) means "very", intensifying 喜欢 (like).

questions.prompt: 我___喜欢黑色的衣服。(I especially like black clothes.)

explanation.en: 「而」(ér) means "but rather", contrasting the correction: 不是A而是B = "not A but B".
explanation.ko: 「而」(ér)는 '不是A而是B' 구문에서 'A가 아니라 B이다'라는 대조를 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 这个盒子不是圆的，___是方的。(This box is not round, it is square.)

explanation.en: 「色」forms color words when following the color name: 白色 = white.
explanation.ko: 「色」는 색 이름 뒤에 붙어 색깔을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 这个杯子是白___的，很干净。(This cup is white, very clean.)

explanation.en: 「颜色」means "color"; 什么颜色 asks about favorite color.

questions.prompt: 你最喜欢什么___？(What is your favorite color?)

explanation.en: The correct structure is 是 + color + 色 + 的: 是红色的 (not 色红).
explanation.ko: 올바른 구조는 '是 + 색 + 色 + 的'이므로 '是红色的'가 맞고 '色红'은 어순 오류이다.

questions.prompt: 这个苹果色红。(This apple is red.) — find the error

explanation.en: 「形」must come after the shape word, forming a single compound noun 正方形 (not split with 是).
explanation.ko: 「形」은 도형 이름 뒤에 붙어 '正方形'이라는 하나의 합성명사를 이루어야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这个盒子形正方。(This box is square-shaped.) — find the error

explanation.en: The color adjective 蓝色的 must precede the noun 天空, forming 蓝色的天空 ("blue sky"); 天空色蓝 is incorrect word order.
explanation.ko: 색 형용사 '蓝色的'는 명사 '天空' 앞에 와야 하므로 '蓝色的天空'이 올바른 어순이다.

questions.prompt: 天空色蓝很漂亮。(The blue sky is very beautiful.) — find the error

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这个苹果是红色的 ("This apple is red").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这个苹果是红色的' (이 사과는 빨간색이다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这个__________。(This apple is red.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 我喜欢蓝色 ("I like blue").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '我喜欢蓝色' (나는 파란색을 좋아한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 我__________蓝色。(I like blue.)
